heading: Today
text: Mostly cloudy. Scattered rain or snow showers in the valleys, with less than an inch; numerous snow showers over high terrain, with 1 to 3 inches in the hills, and 3 to 6 inches over the summits; a snow squall is possible. Valley highs from the mid 30s to lower 40s. Southwest winds becoming west and gusting to 35 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly to partly cloudy. Scattered evening snow showers north, mainly over high terrain. Lows in the teens north, and low to mid 20s in the south. Northwest 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph early, then diminishing.

heading: Sunday
text: Increasing clouds. Chance of afternoon snow in the Adirondacks and St. Lawrence Valley, slight chance late in the northern Greens. Highs from the mid 30s to around 40, some lower 30s far north. Winds becoming south 5 to 10 mph.
